title: Fix False Drift Detection in IncrementalCache

phases.name: Investigation and Diagnosis
phases.description: Identify root cause of false drift detection

tasks.name: Add verbose drift logging
tasks.description: Add detailed logging to checkFiles() to show why each file is marked as changed
acceptance_criteria: Log shows mtime comparison for each file
Log shows size comparison
Log shows hash comparison when mtime differs

tasks.name: Reproduce false drift scenario
tasks.description: Identify specific conditions that trigger false drift (git operations, IDE saves, etc.)
acceptance_criteria: Document exact steps to reproduce
Capture mtime/size/hash values before and after
Identify pattern in affected files

phases.name: Fix Implementation
phases.description: Implement fix for identified root cause

tasks.name: Fix mtime precision issue
tasks.description: Handle sub-millisecond precision differences in file timestamps
acceptance_criteria: Implement tolerance threshold for mtime comparison
Test with files that have microsecond precision differences

tasks.name: Fix path normalization issue
tasks.description: Ensure consistent path format between cache and file system
acceptance_criteria: Normalize all paths to forward slashes
Convert to absolute paths consistently
Test with Windows backslash paths

tasks.name: Fix git checkout mtime issue
tasks.description: Handle files where git changes mtime but not content
acceptance_criteria: Hash comparison always runs when mtime differs
Cache updates mtime after hash verification
No false drift on git operations

phases.name: Testing and Validation
phases.description: Verify fix works in various scenarios

tasks.name: Test unchanged files
tasks.description: Verify 100% hit ratio on truly unchanged files
acceptance_criteria: Run scan twice on same directory
Second scan shows 100% hit ratio
No files incorrectly marked as changed

tasks.name: Test git checkout scenario
tasks.description: Verify no false drift after git operations
acceptance_criteria: Run scan, checkout different branch, checkout back
Final scan shows 100% hit ratio
Files only scanned if content actually changed

tasks.name: Test IDE save scenario
tasks.description: Verify no false drift after IDE touch operations
acceptance_criteria: Save file in IDE without changing content
Run scan and verify file not re-scanned
Hash comparison properly handles touch-only changes

tasks.name: Update CHANGELOG
acceptance_criteria: Added entry for false drift fix
Document root cause and solution

tasks.name: Close workorder
acceptance_criteria: DELIVERABLES.md created with findings
improvements.json updated
All tests passing

success_criteria.primary: Unchanged files show 100% hit ratio on subsequent scans
success_criteria.secondary: Diagnostic output shows clear reason when drift is detected
